original_image_tags: The page appears to be the reverse side of a document, showing faint, mirrored text bleeding through from the other side. Visible at the bottom is an upright blue ink stamp with the text:
Two dark, circular hole-punch marks are visible near the top edge of the page. A faint blue pencil mark or checkmark is visible on the right margin. The paper shows signs of age and handling.

elements.description: A faded ink stamp upside down at the bottom of the page with legible text including 'U.S. DEPT OF JUSTICE', 'F.B.I.', 'SEC'D ESPIONAGE', and 'MAR 10 9 34 AM '53'. There is also a faint, illegible red stamp near the bottom edge. The rest of the page contains faint, illegible reversed text showing through from the other side and two hole-punch marks at the top.

judge.reason: Description A describes a blue upright stamp with no specific text, while Description B reads a detailed, upside-down stamp with specific, contrasting text like 'U.S. DEPT OF JUSTICE' and a date, indicating a direct contradiction in the core visual content being described.
